---
title: "About Awesome Yi"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    # - icon: bluesky
      # text: Bluesky
      # href: https://bsky.app/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mickeyang/
    # - icon: github
    #   text: Github
    #   href: https://github.com

---

Welcome to my corner of the internet!

I'll be honest: I'm not exactly a "post every day" kind of person. I'm more of a "post when inspiration strikes" type.

This blog is essentially **The World in My Eyes** — a digital junk drawer of everything I find fascinating. One day we might be diving deep into the *Data Science* realm, and the next, we might be exploring *religions*, sharing random philosophical shower *thoughts*, or just looking at some cool *photos* I snapped.

It’s a bit of a mixed bag, but hey, so is life. Thanks for stopping by!
